display_text: Null Talisman, Cost: 505: Early-game stat item providing a balanced boost to Intelligence, Strength, Agility, mana, and mana regeneration. display_text: Null Talisman, Cost: 505: Primarily a laning and early-farming item for intelligence-based heroes and casters.
